mapper.insert: insert into gym_engine (gymEngineId, engineName, engineImgUrl, videoImgUrl,videoUrl, createdDate, introduce) values (#{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{engineName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{engineImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into gym_engine
gymEngineId,
engineName,
engineImgUrl,
videoImgUrl,
videoUrl,
createdDate,
introduce,
#{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{engineName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{engineImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update gym_engine
engineName = #{engineName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
engineImgUrl = #{engineImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
videoImgUrl = #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
videoUrl = #{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where gymEngineId = #{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update gym_engine set engineName = #{engineName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, engineImgUrl = #{engineImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoImgUrl = #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoUrl = #{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where gymEngineId = #{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update gym_engine set engineName = #{engineName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, engineImgUrl = #{engineImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoImgUrl = #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoUrl = #{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where gymEngineId = #{gymEngineId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT gymEngineId, engineName FROM gym_engine ORDER BY createdDate DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT engineName, engineImgUrl,videoImgUrl,videoUrl, introduce FROM gym_engine WHERE gymEngineId = #{id}
